# `ApplyCopperList`

**Systems:** Amiga  
**Parameters:** `—`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

Applies the internal copper list. See the label #cop in the assembly source code for details. This method must be called
at least once before initialising a program.


</div>
